response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack and systems experience, including some developer tooling work (CI/CD setup, MCP code generators, test frameworks like Trial and Fluent-Asserts). However, the role requires a Level II people manager with 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years of technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of direct reports, performance management, or running a team. Mobile-platform ecosystem experience is also thin (some iOS/Apple TV work years ago, no Android or mobile build/test infrastructure at scale).
strengths: Strong developer-tooling background (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD, MCP generators)
15+ years of polyglot software engineering with systems and full-stack depth
Active in teaching, workshops, and knowledge sharing (TDD, Selenium, refactoring dojos)
concerns: No demonstrated people management or formal team-leadership tenure
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem experience relevant to the role's focus
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning a team roadmap

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
